# @ic-reactor/vite-plugin — AI Quick Guide

Vite integration for automatic IC Reactor generation from `.did` files.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add -D @ic-reactor/vite-plugin
pnpm add @ic-reactor/react @tanstack/react-query @icp-sdk/core
```

## Minimal Setup

```ts
import { icReactor } from "@ic-reactor/vite-plugin"

icReactor({
  canisters: [{ name: "backend", didFile: "./backend/backend.did" }],
})
```

## Behavior

- Runs codegen on startup and `.did` changes
- Regenerates declarations + `index.generated.ts`
- Preserves user-facing `index.ts` wrapper after initial creation

## Key Options

- `canisters`, `outDir`, `clientManagerPath`, `target`, `mode`, `canisterId`
- `injectEnvironment` for local `ic_env` cookie + `/api` proxy behavior

## Best Practices

- Keep custom code in stable wrapper/factory modules
- Do not hand-edit generated `index.generated.ts`

## Full References

- Full AI guide: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/llms-full.txt
- Vite plugin docs: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/v4/packages/vite-plugin
